Desc: An exaple of using templater to create a structured note with links and variables.

Values.Wisdom: The ability to make sound decisions and judgments based on knowledge and experience.
Values.Justice: The principle of fairness and moral rightness in treating others and making decisions.
Values.Courage: The mental or moral strength to persevere and withstand danger, fear, or difficulty.
Values.Temperance: The practice of self-control, moderation, and restraint in all aspects of life.
